stories.headline: Horoscope for Saturday, June 27, 2026 - Chicago Sun-Times
Vanilla Ice, One of the Few Freedom 250 Event Holdouts, Sees Concert Canceled - TheWrap
stories.summary: Vanilla Ice did not get to perform at Freedom 250's Great American State Fair, even after being one of the only headliners to not back out of the event this month.

stories.headline: ‘Life, Larry’ Director Jeff Schaffer on Obama’s Notes and Why Larry David Will Never Retire: ‘He’s Like a Prostitute Who Has Sex When He’s Not Working’ - Variety
stories.summary: 'Life, Larry and the Pursuit of Unhappiness' director Jeff Schaffer unpacks Barack Obama's feedback and why Larry David will never retire.

stories.headline: Kim Kardashian and Kanye West's Daughter North West Shows Off Lip Piercings During Paris Fashion Week - E! News
stories.summary: Kim Kardashian and Kanye West's daughter North West showed off her angel lip piercings during Paris Fashion Week June 26. The 13-year-old also sported several more facial and hand piercings.

stories.headline: Appeals Court Orders Harvey Weinstein Resentencing, Though Conviction Stands - Yahoo
stories.summary: The former movie producer also awaits sentencing for a conviction in New York. Prosecutors said they'll recommend a 20-year prison term.

stories.headline: ‘Toy Story 5’ Looks To Cross $300M, ‘Supergirl’ Flying Low With $40M Opening – U.S. Box Office Update - Deadline
stories.summary: 'Toy Story 5' looks to cross $300M at U.S. box office this weekend, while 'Supergirl' is opening low with $40M stateside.

stories.headline: Jey Uso: ‘I really don’t care about the fans no more’ - Cageside Seats
stories.summary: Uso admits he’s confused and tries to take it back, but it sounds like he’s really fed up with WWE fans.
